title: RFID Smart Door Access Controller
description: Wall-mounted access control using RFID reader, ESP32, electric door strike, OLED display, and MQTT event logging. OTA updates via WiFi.
objective: Grant/deny access within 500 ms; log all events with UTC timestamp; ≥100 enrolled UIDs.
constraints: 12 V / 1 A supply; IP54 flush-mount; GDPR-compliant (no biometrics).
supporting_fact_titles: N-Channel MOSFET as a Low-Side Power Switch
MQTT Protocol for IoT Sensor Data
OTA Firmware Update for Embedded Devices

element_usage_notes.N-Channel MOSFET Low-Side Load Switch: Drives 12 V NC door strike; 300 ms energise pulse.
